description:
Stay humble and stack sats with simple, fun Bitcoin price alerts.

SatScream shows the live Bitcoin price and fires customizable pump and dump alerts, so you never miss a move.
 
  FEATURES
  • Custom pump and dump price alerts
  • Fiat and Bitcoin Standard (sats-per-dollar) modes
  • Personalize alert sounds with your own audio files
  • Home screen widget showing the current BTC price
  • Light and dark mode
  • No bloat, no ads, no tracking
  
  BITCOIN STANDARD MODE
  View prices in sats per dollar instead of dollars per Bitcoin — because eventually, we'll all be pricing things in sats.
  
  CUSTOM ALERTS
  Tired of boring notification sounds? Upload your own audio for pump and dump alerts.
  
  WIDGET
  Add a home screen widget to always see the current Bitcoin price at a glance.
  
  OPEN SOURCE & PRIVACY FOCUSED
  No data collection, no analytics, no nonsense. Just Bitcoin price alerts.
promotionalText: Live BTC price with customizable pump & dump alerts — Fiat or Bitcoin Standard (sats/$), custom alert sounds, and a home-screen widget. Stay  humble, stack sats.
